ddt:Target.Name: CMFB_CEPS_V2_4
ddt:Target.Description:
History
v1.1 : original extracted from CEPS v2.0 : integration of SAF specificities for JTEKT CEPS only v2.1 : additional SAF screens ; SAF mode DID fullly updated v2.2 : integration of all known DTCs, addition of projects v2.3 : integration of DiagService #31 with Dongle Blanking & SAF DevMod v2.4 : bug corrections (DTC unused deleted, DongleBlanking)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
General Electrical Failure
General signal failure
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
System Internal Failures
System Programming Failures
Algorithm Based Failures
Mechanical Failures
Bus Signal / Message Failures
Component Failures
circuit short to ground
circuit short to battery
circuit open
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
circuit voltage below threshold
circuit voltage above threshold
circuit current below threshold
circuit current above threshold
circuit resistance below threshold
circuit resistance above threshold
circuit voltage out of range
circuit current out of range
circuit resistance out of range
circuit intermittent
signal amplitude < minimum
signal amplitude > maximum
signal stuck low
signal stuck high
signal shape / waveform failure
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal signal invalid
signal erratic
no signal
signal low time < minimum
signal low time > maximum
signal high time < minimum
signal high time > maximum
signal frequency too low
signal frequency too high
signal frequency incorrect
incorrect has too few pulses
incorrect has too many pulses
general checksum failure
general memory failure
special memory failure
data memory failure
program memory failure
calibration / parameter memory failure
watchdog / safety µC failure
supervision software failure
internal electronic failure
incorrect component installed
over temperature
not programmed
not activated
missing calibration
not configured
signal calculation failure
signal compare failure
circuit / component protection time-out
signal plausibility failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
signal incorrect after event
event information
actuator stuck
actuator stuck open
actuator stuck closed
actuator slipping
emergency position not reachable
wrong mounting position
commanded position not reachable
alignment or adjustment incorrect
mechanical linkage failure
fluid leak or seal failure
low fluid level
invalid serial data received
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
signal below allowable range
signal above allowable range
signal invalid
missing message
bus off
performance or incorrect operation
no operation
unexpected operation
incorrect assembly
component internal failure
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
component or system over temperature
General Failure Information
General Electrical Failures
General Signal Failures
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
System Internal Failures
System Programming Failures
Algorithm Based Failures
Mechanical Failures
Bus Signal / Message Failures
Component Failures
Vehicle manufacturer / System supplier specific
SWA inconsistency
Battery Voltage Fault
EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection Controller
EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection Motor
CAN parameter is absent (SONAR)
CAN Wheelspeed fault (ABS/VDC) Invalid
CAN Vehicle speed fault (ABS/VDC) Invalid
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Invalid
CAN G sensor fault(ABS/VDC) Invalid
CAN parameter is invalid (ADAS)
CAN parameter is invalid (SONAR)
CAN parameter is invalid (CAMERA)
CAN vehicle speed fault (Cluster) Invalid
CAN signal Mute Fault
CAN BUSS OFF Fault
Lost communication with ECM
CAN parameter is absent (ADAS)
Lost communication with USM
CAN parameter is absent
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Absent
Lost communication with BCM
CAN vehicle speed fault (Cluster) Absent
Can parameter is absent (CAMERA)
Checksum incorrect (ADAS)
Checksum incorrect
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Checksum incorrect
Clock incorrect (ADAS)
Clock incorrect
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Clock Incorrect
Clock incorrect (CAMERA)
CAN Signal Absent/Mute/Buss Off Fault
EPS Fault - ECU Not configured
EPS Fault ECU Missing Calibration
CAN parameter is absent (MultiMode)
Checksum incorrect (CAMERA)

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: AssistanceLevel
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ASSISTANCE_LEVEL/Percentage of assistance avaliable

Data.Name: FilteredVehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: FILTERED VEHICLE SPEED/HEPS calculation ; information in use

Data.Name: ECUTemperature
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: ECU_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

Data.Name: SupplyVoltage
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: VOLTAGE_ST/Computer supply voltage

Data.Name: MotorTemperature
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: Motor_TEMPERATURE/Value of the temperature sensor

Data.Name: Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: system mode (renault stateflow)

Item.Text: Not initialized / No failure / Not calibrated
Initialized / No failure / Not calibrated
Not initialized / Failure / Not calibrated
Initialized / Failure / Not calibrated
Not initialized / No failure / Calibrated
Initialized / No failure / Calibrated
Not initialized / Failure / Calibrated
Initialized / Failure / Calibrated
not running

Data.Name: Internal fault code (for DTC)
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: INTERNAL_FAULT_CODE/Supplier fault code for this DTC

Item.Text: 00: Not Stop Auto Phase
01: Auto Start
10: Idle Stop
11: Auto Phase Aborted

Data.Name: SystemMode
Data.Comment: cf. Spec DiagOnCAN: system mode (renault stateflow)

Item.Text: PowerUpTests Wait for Assist
VerySoftRampDown Unknow Vehicle State
Function not running
Function currently running
No failure
Minor failure
Major failure
Not used
Unavailable value
Operational / learnt
Operational / blank
Not operational
No error
EEPROM problem on Dongle_ID
EEPROM problem on Dongle_pairing_counter
Motor disconnected from ECU
Development frames not sent
Development frames sent
Slot #0 is currently used
Slot #1 is currently used
Slot #2 is currently used
Slot #3 is currently used
Ignore multidrive CAN frame
Consider multidrive CAN frame
Not used
LKA disabled, LDW disabled
LKA disabled, LDW enabled
LKA enabled, LDW disabled
LKA enabled, LDW enabled
Idle_stop flag enabled, others disabled
Coast_stop flag enabled, others disabled
Torque_on flag enabled, others disabled
Idle_stop and Torque_on flags enabled, others disabled
Coast_stop and Torque_on flags enabled, others disabled
Assist_authorize flag disabled, others enabled
Assist_authorize flag enabled, others disabled
Idle_stop and Assist_authorize flags enabled, others disabled
Coast_stop and Assist_authorize flags enabled, others disabled
Torque_on flag disabled, others enabled
Idle_stop and Coast_stop flags disabled, others enabled
Coast_stop flags disabled, others enabled
Idle_stop flag disabled, others enabled
All flags enabled

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

recovered from RCC3 / recovered from RCC2 / calibrated / calibrated / kown / kown
unkown / recovered from RCC3 / calibrated / calibrated / kown / kown
recovered from RCC1 / recovered from RCC3 / calibrated / calibrated / kown / kown
recovered from RCC2 / recovered from RCC3 / calibrated / calibrated / kown / kown
recovered from RCC3 / unkown / calibrated / calibrated / kown / kown

Data.Name: SAF_Job2Diag_Angle_Input
Data.Comment: Angle to simulate Job2Diag information sent by PEV station, in Plant Init SAF step

Request.Name: DataRead.Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Request.Comment: Read Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

DataItem.Name: Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: DataRead.MaxCPULoad
Request.Comment: Read max CPU load during mission

Test.Description: Internal electronic failure not necessarily leading to (H)EPS replacement

Device.Name: EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection Motor
EPS Fault - Derating (H)EPS thermal protection Controller

Test.Description: This DTC when configuration is inconsistent

Device.Name: CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Invalid
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Absent
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Clock Incorrect
CAN Steering Wheel Angle fault (STRG) Checksum incorrect

Test.Description: SystemMode gets equal to 4 "very_soft_ramp_down" (= enters statemode 4)

Display.DataName: Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Label.Text: Shall be = PowerUpTests Wait for Assist
Check the log after clicking the button to check everything went well (it should read $710702)

Display.DataName: Steering wheel angle sensor internal status
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Steering wheel angle sensor internal status

Label.Text: 00x00000 : Rack Stroke Calibration Status (0 : disabled ; 1 : enabled)
0000xx00 : Current Recover Status of Left Rack End
(00 : unkown ; 01 : from RCC1 ; 10 : from RCC2 ; 11 : from RCC3)
000000xx : Current Recover Status of Right Rack End
(00 : unkown ; 01 : from RCC1 ; 10 : from RCC2 ; 11 : from RCC3)
